title: Problem Discovery in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger problem discovery in practice judgment so product work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Problem Discovery in Practice is a leverage point inside product. It supports the broader goal of what to build, what not to build, and how to ship it.
coreConcepts: Problem Discovery in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good problem discovery in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Problem Discovery in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
